editorial_accuracy.notes: 31 chapters with evidence tiers, cross-links, reading time. RSS feed for content syndication.

information_design.notes: JSON-LD + OG + Twitter + canonical on all pages. Sitemap with all routes incl analytics. RSS autodiscovery. Analytics page.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Dark mode toggle with system preference detection. Newsletter signup. Branded 404 page. Footer Support CTA restored.

code_quality.notes: Firebase analytics with clean abstraction. ThemeContext. All pages code-split. Zero TS errors.

accessibility.notes: Print evidence tiers distinguishable via border styles (solid/dashed/dotted). Dark mode respects prefers-color-scheme. line-clamp-3 added.

security.notes: No regressions. Newsletter stores to localStorage only. Firebase config via env vars.
